name: Haricots Verts with Butter and Shallots
description: Thin French green beans steamed just to crisp-tender, then tossed with butter, shallot, and a squeeze of lemon.
recipeIngredient: 1 pound haricots verts, stem ends trimmed
recipeInstructions: Steam the haricots verts until crisp-tender and bright green, 2 to 3 minutes.
Heat the butter and olive oil in a skillet over medium heat. Add the shallot and cook until softened, about 1 minute.
Add the steamed beans and toss to coat in the butter. Season with kosher salt and a squeeze of lemon, and serve.
author: The Kitchn

ai.cliffNotes: Steam the beans just to crisp-tender, then toss in butter with softened shallot and a squeeze of lemon for a bright, classic French side.
keyTips: Pull the beans at 2–3 minutes while still bright and snappy — carryover heat finishes them once tossed in the butter.
Add the lemon off the heat so it stays fresh and bright.
